name: Pat Metheny
abstract: Patrick Bruce Metheny ( məth-EE-nee; born August 12, 1954) is an American jazz guitarist and composer. He was the leader of the Pat Metheny Group (1977–2010) and continues to work in various small-combo, duet, and solo settings, as well as other side projects.

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: Pat Metheny was in my band at that time, and he said, “Oh, if you guys are going to go play, I’m going... So I’m coming along. I’ll help carry the vibes. Whatever. I’m going.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: The Pat Metheny Quintet with Dewey Redman, Michael Brecker, Metheny, Charlie Haden and yourself... Pat and I had been playing together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: It’s yourself, Herbie Hancock, Pat Matheny... We toured that band worldwide
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Roy Haynes
about_quotes.evidence: Pat knew more about me than we had anticipated. He used to listen to me with my groups in Boston way back... He tells me those were his favorite – some of his favorite records. So he was familiar with me back there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roy Haynes — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Lundy
about_quotes.evidence: "What happened to Pat Metheny? 'Oh he left and moved to New York.' ... I’m thinking what is this New York thing and what is everybody doing going to this New York place?"
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Lundy interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 15, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: There is a great interview with Pat Metheny I saw recently where he talked about how so many young improvisers today, their solos are just made up of non sequiturs.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 22, 2021
